info.title: eqx
info.description: Efficient event sourced decisions and data

commands.name: destroy
commands.description:
DELETE documents for a nominated category and/or
stream (includes a dry-run mode). (supports `cosmos`
only).

options.name: --streamname
options.description:
Specify stream name to match against `p`, e.g.
`$UserServices-f7c1ce63389a45bdbea1cccebb1b3c8a`.

options.name: --streamlike
options.description: `%-f7c1ce63389a45bdbea1cccebb1b3c8a`.

options.name: --categoryname
options.description:
Specify category name to match against `p`, e.g.
`$UserServices`.

options.name: --categorylike
options.description:
Specify category name to match against `p` as a
Cosmos LIKE expression (with `%` as wildcard, e.g.
`$UserServices-%`).

options.name: --customfilter
options.description:
Specify a custom filter, referencing the document as
`c.` (e.g. `'c.p LIKE "test-%" AND c._ts <
1717138092'`)

options.name: --force
options.description:
Actually delete the documents (default is a dry run,
reporting what would be deleted)

options.name: --parallelism
options.description:
Number of concurrent delete requests permitted to run
in parallel. Default: 32

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --storeverbose
options.description: Include low level Store logging.

options.name: --connectionmode
options.description: override the connection mode. Default: Direct.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: specify operation timeout in seconds (default: 5).

options.name: --retries
options.description: specify operation retries (default: 1).

options.name: --retrieswaittimes
options.description:
specify max wait-time for retry when being throttled
by Cosmos in seconds (default: 5)

options.name: --connection
options.description:
specify a connection string for a Cosmos account.
(optional if environment variable
EQUINOX_COSMOS_CONNECTION specified)

options.name: --database
options.description:
specify a database name for store. (optional if
environment variable EQUINOX_COSMOS_DATABASE
specified)

options.name: --container
options.description:
specify a container name for store. (optional if
environment variable EQUINOX_COSMOS_CONTAINER

options.name: --archiveconnection
options.description:
specify a connection string for Archive Cosmos
account. Default: use same as Primary Connection

options.name: --archivedatabase
options.description:
specify a database name for Archive store. Default:
use same as Primary Database

options.name: --archivecontainer
options.description:
specify a container name for Archive store. Default:
use same as Primary Container

options.name: --tipmaxevents
options.description:
specify maximum number of events to hold in Tip
before calving off to a frozen Batch. Default: 256

options.name: --tipmaxjsonlength
options.description:
specify maximum length of JSON (as measured by
JSON.stringify) to hold in Tip before calving off to
a frozen Batch. Default: 30,000

options.name: --querymaxitems
options.description:
specify maximum number of batches of events to
retrieve in per query response. Default: 10/9999

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: dump
commands.description:
Load and show events in a specified stream (supports
all stores).

options.name: --streamlike
options.description:
(CosmosDB only) Specify stream name pattern to dump:
LIKE expression with `%` and `_` tokens etc.

options.name: --correlation
options.description: Include Correlation/Causation identifiers

options.name: --blobs
options.description: Don't assume Data/Metadata is UTF-8 text

options.name: --jsonskip
options.description: Don't assume Data/Metadata is JSON

options.name: --pretty
options.description: Pretty print the JSON over multiple lines

options.name: --flattenunfolds
options.description:
Don't pretty print the JSON over multiple lines for
Unfolds. Quiet mode: Pretty print

options.name: --timeregular
options.description: Don't humanize time intervals between events

options.name: --intervals
options.description:
Omit intervals between events. Quiet mode: Include
intervals

options.name: --names
options.description:
Emit StreamName prior to events/unfolds instead of
adding log context. Quiet mode: exclude stream names

options.name: --unfoldsonly
options.description: Exclude Events. Default: show both Events and Unfolds

options.name: --eventsonly
options.description:
Exclude Unfolds/Snapshots. Default: show both Events
and Unfolds.

options.name: --regionprofile
options.description:
specify an AWS Region (aka System Name, e.g.
"us-east-1") to connect to using the implicit AWS
SDK/tooling config and/or environment variables etc.
Optional if:
1) $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_REGION specified OR
2) Explicit
`ServiceUrl`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_SERVICE_URL+`AccessKey`/$
EQUINOX_DYNAMO_ACCESS_KEY_ID+`Secret
Key`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY specified.
See
https://docs.aws.amazon.com/cli/latest/userguide/cli-c
onfigure-envvars.html for details

options.name: --serviceurl
options.description:
specify a server endpoint for a Dynamo account. (Not
applicable if `ServiceRegion`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_REGION
specified; Optional if $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_SERVICE_URL
specified)

options.name: --accesskey
options.description:
specify an access key id for a Dynamo account. (Not
specified; Optional if $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_ACCESS_KEY_ID

options.name: --secretkey
options.description:
specify a secret access key for a Dynamo account.
(Not applicable if
`ServiceRegion`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_REGION specified;
Optional if $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY

options.name: --table
options.description:
specify a table name for the primary store. (optional
if $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_TABLE specified)

options.name: --archivetable
options.description:
specify a table name for the Archive; Optional if
$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_TABLE_ARCHIVE specified.
Default: Do not attempt to look in an Archive store
as a Fallback to locate pruned events.

options.name: --retries
options.description: specify operation retries (default: 1).

options.name: --retriestimeouts
options.description:
specify max wait-time including retries in seconds
(default: 5)

options.name: --tipmaxbytes
options.description:
specify maximum number of bytes to hold in Tip before
calving off to a frozen Batch. Default: 32K

options.name: --tipmaxevents
options.description:
specify maximum number of events to hold in Tip
before calving off to a frozen Batch. Default:
limited by Max Bytes

options.name: --querymaxitems
options.description:
specify maximum number of batches of events to
retrieve in per query response. Default: 10

commands.name: init
commands.description:
Initialize Store/Container (supports `cosmos` stores;
also handles RU/s provisioning adjustment).

options.name: --rus
options.description:
Specify RU/s level to provision (Not applicable for
Serverless Mode; Default: 400 RU/s for
Container/Database; Default: Max 4000 RU/s for
Container/Database when Autoscale specified).

options.name: --autoscale
options.description:
Autoscale provisioned throughput. Use --rus to
specify the maximum RU/s.

options.name: --mode
options.description:
Configure RU mode to use Container-level RU,
Database-level RU, or Serverless allocations
(Default: Use Container-level allocation).

options.name: --skipstoredproc
options.description:
Inhibit creation of stored procedure in specified
Container.

options.name: --indexunfolds
options.description:
Index `c` and `d` fields within the `u` field of Tip
items. Default: Don't index

commands.name: initaws
commands.description:
Initialize DynamoDB Table (supports `dynamo` stores;
also handles RU/s provisioning adjustment).

options.name: --ondemand
options.description:
Specify On-Demand Capacity Mode. (Default:
Provisioned mode)

options.name: --streaming
options.description:
Specify Streaming Mode: New=NEW_IMAGE,
NewAndOld=NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES, Off=Disabled.

options.name: --readcu
options.description:
Specify Read Capacity Units to provision for the
Table. (Not applicable in On-Demand mode)

options.name: --name
options.description: specify which test to run. (default: Favorite).

options.name: --size
options.description:
For `-t Todo`: specify random title length max size
to use (default 100).

options.name: --cached
options.description: employ a 50MB cache, wire in to Stream configuration.

options.name: --unfolds
options.description:
employ a store-appropriate Rolling Snapshots and/or
Unfolding strategy.

options.name: --testspersecond
options.description:
specify a target number of requests per second
(default: 1000).

options.name: --durationm
options.description: specify a run duration in minutes (default: 30).

options.name: --errorcutoff
options.description:
specify an error cutoff; test ends when exceeded
(default: 10000).

options.name: --reportintervals
options.description: specify reporting intervals in seconds (default: 10).

commands.name: web

options.name: --endpoint
options.description: Target address. Default: https://localhost:5001

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: query
commands.description:
Load/Summarise streams based on Cosmos SQL Queries
(supports `cosmos` only).

options.name: --streamname
options.description:
Specify stream name to match against `p`, e.g.
`$UserServices-f7c1ce63389a45bdbea1cccebb1b3c8a`.

options.name: --streamlike
options.description: `%-f7c1ce63389a45bdbea1cccebb1b3c8a`.

options.name: --categoryname
options.description:
Specify category name to match against `p`, e.g.
`$UserServices`.

options.name: --categorylike
options.description:
Specify category name to match against `p` as a
Cosmos LIKE expression (with `%` as wildcard, e.g.
`$UserServices-%`).

options.name: --unfoldname
options.description:
Specify unfold Name to match against `u.c`, e.g.
`Snapshotted`

options.name: --unfoldcriteria
options.description:
Specify constraints on Unfold (reference unfold
fields via `u.d.`, top level fields via `c.`), e.g.
`u.d.name = "TenantName1"`.

options.name: --mode
options.description:
snaponly: Only read `u[0].d+D`
snapwithstream: As per `snaponly`, but add `p`
(stream name)`.
default: As per `snapwithstream`, but add `_etag`
readonly: Only read `u`nfolds, not `_etag`.
readwithstream: Read `u`nfolds and `p` (stream name),
but not `_etag`.
raw: Read Items (documents) in full. <- Default when
Output File specified

options.name: --file
options.description:
Export full retrieved JSON to file. NOTE this
switches the default mode to `Raw`

options.name: --pretty
options.description: Render the JSON indented over multiple lines

options.name: --console
options.description:
Also emit the JSON to the console. Default: Gather
statistics (but only write to a File if specified)

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --storeverbose
options.description: Include low level Store logging.

options.name: --connectionmode
options.description: override the connection mode. Default: Direct.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: specify operation timeout in seconds (default: 5).

options.name: --retries
options.description: specify operation retries (default: 1).

options.name: --retrieswaittimes
options.description:
specify max wait-time for retry when being throttled
by Cosmos in seconds (default: 5)

options.name: --connection
options.description:
specify a connection string for a Cosmos account.
(optional if environment variable
EQUINOX_COSMOS_CONNECTION specified)

options.name: --database
options.description:
specify a database name for store. (optional if
environment variable EQUINOX_COSMOS_DATABASE
specified)

options.name: --container
options.description:
specify a container name for store. (optional if
environment variable EQUINOX_COSMOS_CONTAINER

options.name: --archiveconnection
options.description:
specify a connection string for Archive Cosmos
account. Default: use same as Primary Connection

options.name: --archivedatabase
options.description:
specify a database name for Archive store. Default:
use same as Primary Database

options.name: --archivecontainer
options.description:
specify a container name for Archive store. Default:
use same as Primary Container

options.name: --tipmaxevents
options.description:
specify maximum number of events to hold in Tip
before calving off to a frozen Batch. Default: 256

options.name: --tipmaxjsonlength
options.description:
specify maximum length of JSON (as measured by
JSON.stringify) to hold in Tip before calving off to
a frozen Batch. Default: 30,000

options.name: --querymaxitems
options.description:
specify maximum number of batches of events to
retrieve in per query response. Default: 10/9999

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: stats
commands.description:
inspect store to determine numbers of
streams/documents/events and/or config (supports
`cosmos` and `dynamo` stores).

options.name: --events
options.description: Count the number of Events in the store.

options.name: --unfolds
options.description: Count the number of Unfolds in the store.

options.name: --streams
options.description: Count the number of Streams in the store.

options.name: --items
options.description: Count the number of Items (documents) in the store.

options.name: --oldest
options.description: Oldest document, based on the _ts field

options.name: --newest
options.description: Newest document, based on the _ts field

options.name: --parallel
options.description:
Run in Parallel (CAREFUL! can overwhelm RU
allocations).

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --storeverbose
options.description: Include low level Store logging.

options.name: --connectionmode
options.description: override the connection mode. Default: Direct.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: specify operation timeout in seconds (default: 5).

options.name: --retries
options.description: specify operation retries (default: 1).

options.name: --retrieswaittimes
options.description:
specify max wait-time for retry when being throttled
by Cosmos in seconds (default: 5)

options.name: --connection
options.description:
specify a connection string for a Cosmos account.
(optional if environment variable
EQUINOX_COSMOS_CONNECTION specified)

options.name: --database
options.description:
specify a database name for store. (optional if
environment variable EQUINOX_COSMOS_DATABASE
specified)

options.name: --container
options.description:
specify a container name for store. (optional if
environment variable EQUINOX_COSMOS_CONTAINER

options.name: --archiveconnection
options.description:
specify a connection string for Archive Cosmos
account. Default: use same as Primary Connection

options.name: --archivedatabase
options.description:
specify a database name for Archive store. Default:
use same as Primary Database

options.name: --archivecontainer
options.description:
specify a container name for Archive store. Default:
use same as Primary Container

options.name: --tipmaxevents
options.description:
specify maximum number of events to hold in Tip
before calving off to a frozen Batch. Default: 256

options.name: --tipmaxjsonlength
options.description:
specify maximum length of JSON (as measured by
JSON.stringify) to hold in Tip before calving off to
a frozen Batch. Default: 30,000

options.name: --querymaxitems
options.description:
specify maximum number of batches of events to
retrieve in per query response. Default: 10/9999

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --storeverbose
options.description: Include low level Store logging.

options.name: --regionprofile
options.description:
specify an AWS Region (aka System Name, e.g.
"us-east-1") to connect to using the implicit AWS
SDK/tooling config and/or environment variables etc.
Optional if:
1) $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_REGION specified OR
2) Explicit
`ServiceUrl`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_SERVICE_URL+`AccessKey`/$
EQUINOX_DYNAMO_ACCESS_KEY_ID+`Secret
Key`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY specified.
See
https://docs.aws.amazon.com/cli/latest/userguide/cli-c
onfigure-envvars.html for details

options.name: --serviceurl
options.description:
specify a server endpoint for a Dynamo account. (Not
applicable if `ServiceRegion`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_REGION
specified; Optional if $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_SERVICE_URL
specified)

options.name: --accesskey
options.description:
specify an access key id for a Dynamo account. (Not
specified; Optional if $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_ACCESS_KEY_ID

options.name: --secretkey
options.description:
specify a secret access key for a Dynamo account.
(Not applicable if
`ServiceRegion`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_REGION specified;
Optional if $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY

options.name: --table
options.description:
specify a table name for the primary store. (optional
if $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_TABLE specified)

options.name: --archivetable
options.description:
specify a table name for the Archive; Optional if
$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_TABLE_ARCHIVE specified.
Default: Do not attempt to look in an Archive store
as a Fallback to locate pruned events.

options.name: --retries
options.description: specify operation retries (default: 1).

options.name: --retriestimeouts
options.description:
specify max wait-time including retries in seconds
(default: 5)

options.name: --tipmaxbytes
options.description:
specify maximum number of bytes to hold in Tip before
calving off to a frozen Batch. Default: 32K

options.name: --tipmaxevents
options.description:
specify maximum number of events to hold in Tip
before calving off to a frozen Batch. Default:
limited by Max Bytes

options.name: --querymaxitems
options.description:
specify maximum number of batches of events to
retrieve in per query response. Default: 10

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: top
commands.description:
Scan to determine top categories and streams
(supports `cosmos` only).

options.name: --streamname
options.description:
Specify stream name to match against `p`, e.g.
`$UserServices-f7c1ce63389a45bdbea1cccebb1b3c8a`.

options.name: --categoryname
options.description:
Specify category name to match against `p`, e.g.
`$UserServices`.

options.name: --categorylike
options.description:
Specify category name to match against `p` as a
Cosmos LIKE expression (with `%` as wildcard, e.g.
`$UserServices-%`).

options.name: --customfilter
options.description:
Specify a custom filter, referencing the document as
`c.` (e.g. `'c.p LIKE "test-%" AND c._ts <
1717138092'`)

options.name: --streams
options.description: Stream level stats

options.name: --tsorder
options.description:
Retrieve data in `_ts` ORDER (generally has
significant RU impact). Default: Use continuation
tokens

options.name: --categorylimit
options.description: unlimited.

options.name: --streamslimit
options.description: Number of streams to limit output to. Default: 50

options.name: --sort
options.description: Sort order for results

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Omit timestamps from log output

options.name: --verbose

Include low level logging regarding specific test
runs.

options.name: --verboseconsole
options.description:
Include low level test and store actions logging in

options.description:
Configures writing to a local Seq endpoint at
http://localhost:5341, see https://getseq.net
